task: Worker pool implemented and integrated. Pool wraps runCommand with task queue, per-user concurrency cap, idle timeout, shutdown. All 29 tests pass. Ready to check gate, commit, deploy.

hermesRailwayProbe.summary: Probed Hermes v0.16.0 on Railway production container. Mapped 50 subcommands, confirmed HERMES_HOME env var, skills persistence, ~140 MB idle RSS, skill format (SKILL.md with YAML frontmatter), workspace structure (SOUL.md, state.db SQLite, tirith scanner, sandboxes). Created docs/hermes/ with dual JSON+MD discovery docs, MAINTENANCE.md, and ops test (20 assertions, auto-discovered).

docsHermes.summary: Created docs/hermes/README.md, hermes-discovery.json, hermes-discovery.md, MAINTENANCE.md. Added official upstream Hermes docs cache at docs/hermes/upstream/llms.txt and llms-full.txt, machine-readable docs/hermes/upstream/hermes-docs.agent.json, and docs/hermes/AGENT_CONTEXT.md for future Hades/Hermes coding agents. All docs validation tests pass.

hermesDocsFirstRule.summary: Standing rule from user: before any Hermes/Hades-Hermes architecture, security, gateway, profile, runtime, container, auth, or implementation strategy, read the local official Hermes docs cache first. Minimum reads: docs/hermes/AGENT_CONTEXT.md, docs/hermes/upstream/hermes-docs.agent.json, and relevant sections from docs/hermes/upstream/llms-full.txt (Profiles, Security, Gateway Internals, Architecture, Environment Variables, messaging docs). Do not rely on generic agent threat models when Hermes docs define an existing primitive.

hermesNativeIsolationCorrection.summary: Corrected Hermes-native architecture stance: multi-user isolation should use Hermes Profiles as the first-class primitive. A profile is a separate HERMES_HOME with config.yaml, .env, SOUL.md, memories, sessions, skills, cron jobs, gateway state, and state DB. Profiles are not sandboxes; production security requires Docker/Modal/Daytona/Singularity-style container backends with Hermes' documented hardening. Stock Hermes gateway expects per-profile bot tokens in each profile .env and blocks duplicate bot token use across profiles; Hades-owned Telegram broker is a deliberate product departure, not stock Hermes behavior. Hermes already includes env filtering for execute_code/MCP subprocesses, session isolation, cron path hardening, SSRF protections, context-file prompt-injection scanning, and credential redaction. Future Hades/Hermes plans must configure these primitives per tenant instead of reinventing them.

hermesDiscoveryDocsTest.summary: Created backend/src/modules/hades/__tests__/hermesDiscoveryDocs.ops.test.js. Updated to validate upstream Hermes docs cache and agent JSON index; 23 assertions pass.

hermesWorkerPoolPlan.summary: Implemented hermesWorkerPool.service.js with createHermesWorkerPool() — task queue wrapping runCommand with configurable maxWorkers (default 4), per-user concurrency cap (default 2), idle timeout callback, shutdown with force-kill support, and getStats(). Integrated into hermesRuntime.service.js as a drop-in replacement for runCommand. All 12 worker pool TDD tests + all 17 hermesRuntime TDD tests pass.

autonomousHermesRuntimeTdd.summary: Implemented 7 runtime modules (hermesWorkspace, hermesRoutingToken, hermesCapabilityEnvelope, hermesStateStore, hermesBoundaryActionBroker, hermesProcessManager, hermesStateRepository) and 2 migrations (012_hades_hermes_state_index, 013_hades_hermes_task_routes). All files written to backend/src/modules/hades/runtime/, backend/src/modules/hades/repositories/, and backend/src/modules/hades/migrations/.

autonomousHermesAudit.summary: Double-checked autonomous Hermes study, plan, handoff, package scripts, and TDD tests. Fixed stale planning/study wording that still referred to old skill-sync follow-up work. Verified no stale handoff language remains; backend TDD suite is intentionally red with 14 missing-implementation failures, and E2E suite safely skips 4 checks unless HADES_AUTONOMOUS_HERMES_E2E=1.

autonomousHermesSupabaseBridgeTdd.summary: All 9 bridge gaps implemented and passing (9/9). Fixes: (Gap 2) snake_case vs camelCase in verifyResponse fallback â€” route.processId || route.process_id, (Gap 7) object_key/relative_path snake_case handling in hydrateWorkspace. Files: hermesStateRepository.js, hermesRoutingToken.js, hermesObjectStore.js, hermesFilesystem.js, hermesRuntimeSpawn.js, hermesArtifactStore.js, hermesStateStore.js, hermesProcessManager.js, index.js. 9 unit tests pass, architecture lint passes.

instagramFix.summary: Fixed Composio Instagram auth URL from v3.1 to v3 (API endpoint changed). Changed alias assertion from hardcoded to startsWith() to match production code that appends timestamp suffix. Tests pass 2/2.

extensionRefactor.summary: Massive CSS refactor (+595 lines) plus JSX structural improvements across all 8 extension panels: ApprovalQueue, ContextUpload, HadesChat, HadesExtensionApp, PageCapture, TextContextSpaces, WorkflowDetail, WorkflowList. Added extension install card styles, rebuilt build artifacts.

instagramTestCoverage.summary: Added 4 error-case tests to Instagram social routes: DELETE 404, POST connect 500, webhook 400/429. Total 8 tests pass. Retired the 'Instagram DM endpoint untested in CI' risk.

supabaseHermesMigrationsApplied.summary: Applied 012_hades_hermes_state_index.sql and 013_hades_hermes_task_routes.sql to Supabase production. Tables hades_hermes_state_objects and hades_hermes_task_routes now exist (0 rows). Bridge gap code already deployed to Railway (commit 89cfbe8, build SUCCESS). Railway logs not accessible (no viewer role).

hadesHermesPeerModel.summary: Implemented peer-model edge-routing architecture. Fixed 2 bugs in hades module (createHermesCapabilityEnvelope called with no args; extensionApprovals TDZ). Rewrote hermesRoutingToken.js for stateless self-contained HMAC-signed tokens. Updated hermesBoundaryActionBroker.js with Hades-down queue fallback. Created 6 new modules: hermesProfileRegistry.js, hermesProfileRouter.js, hermesProfileProvisioner.js, hermesProfileStatePersistence.js, hermesProfileSessionBroker.js, hermesEdgeAuthProxy.js. Refactored hermes.routes.js (removed old proxy routes, added POST /sessions + GET /state). Refactored index.js (route factory renamed, mount path changed to variable). All 13/13 peer-model TDD, 23/23 autonomous hermes runtime, 10/10 wiring tests, architecture lint: all clean. Added API docs for new routes.

postImplementationAudit.summary: Ran full post-implementation audit per handoffs #019/#020 and plan #012. Found and fixed 2 bugs: (1) hermesProfileProvisioner wrote combined config file instead of separate .env + config.yaml â€” Hermes would not parse it. (2) index.js wired session broker with provisioner as profileRegistry, so registry map was never populated â€” edge proxy internalTargetForProfile would fail. Both fixed. All 13/13 peer-model TDD + 23/23 autonomous runtime + 10/10 wiring + lint:architecture clean. No secrets leaked in any runtime or test file. 4 pre-existing failures in unrelated tests (contract-discovery URL type, live two-user isolation, chat idempotency, extension zip manifest) â€” none regressed.

hadesHermesPeerDockerRailwayProof.summary: Created final OpenCode proof packet for local Docker/Railway validation before production: work-log/handoffs/021_2026-06-19_handoff_opencode_final_peer_docker_railway_proof.md and scripts/hades-hermes-peer-docker-proof.e2e.test.mjs. The env-gated proof suite skips by default and becomes red when HADES_HERMES_PEER_PROOF_E2E=1 until proof hooks and Docker/Railway wiring exist. It verifies edge-injected auth, no API_SERVER_KEY/browser secret leakage, private loopback/internal profile API targets, persistent per-user Hermes profile state on volume/Railway mount, private secret-stripped state snapshots, and restart persistence for profile route + state index metadata. Root package script added: npm run test:hades-hermes-peer-docker-proof.

compactionDocFix.summary: Documented measure_context.py limitations (manual bookkeeping tool, not runtime monitor; stale sessionEnd bug) in OPCODE_CONFIG_NOTES.md and RUNTIME_COMPACTION_SMOKE_TEST.md. Ran compaction smoke test: 150k payload generated with all 3 markers, read successfully. Config confirmed correct.

dockerProofHooks.summary: All 5/5 Docker/Railway proof E2E tests passing. Implemented: proof hooks (GET /proof/profile, POST /proof/snapshot, POST /proof/restart, POST /proof/create), provisioner placeholder state files (state.db, sessions/, memories/), hermesFilesystem readTree/writeTree, hermesObjectStore putJson/getJson, persistent /state-index route. Tests: 13/13 peer-model + 23/23 autonomous runtime + 10/10 wiring + 16/16 contracts + lint:architecture all pass. Proof tests: 5/5 pass with env-enabled.
dockerProofHooks.hermesDocsFirstRule: Standing rule: always consult local Hermes docs cache (docs/hermes-agent/*.md) before making Hermes-related architecture, security, gateway, profile, or container changes.

lvhMeDnsMigration.summary: Replaced hades.docker.internal with lvh.me in docker-compose.yaml and .env.docker. Removed Windows hosts file entry. lvh.me resolves to 127.0.0.1 via public DNS â€” no hosts file modification needed. All 5/5 proof tests pass without hosts modification. AGENTS.md updated with Hermes-docs-first rule.

frontendPatchNotes.summary: Created docs/hades/PEER_MODEL_FRONTEND_PATCH_NOTES.md with full agent-readable patch notes covering: what exists, auth model, frontend gaps (3), backend gaps remaining (4), and priority-ordered ship sequence for frontend integration.

snapshotLifecycleFix.summary: Fixed snapshot lifecycle: snapshot key changed from accumulating timestamp-based to fixed 'latest' key with upsert. restoreProfile() resolves latest key when no explicit objectKey provided. Added POST /proof/restore route that calls profileStatePersistence.restoreProfile(). Added auto-restore in GET /proof/profile â€” automatically restores profile state on Hermes startup when no state.db exists. All 7 snapshot TDD tests pass. Pre-existing 2 architecture boundary test failures unchanged.

railwayDeploy.summary: Pushed 239 files to master (1b3be75). Railway project virtuous-tranquility has old deploy at 5fe8e4f. Dev log written to work-log/dev-logs/human/007_2026-06-19_dev-log_peer-model-railway-deploy.md.

vercelSymlinkFix.summary: Diagnosed Vercel 'Unable to unpack repo' build failure (first at commit 1b3be75). Root cause: opencode.json was a broken symlink with ~600B JSON blob content instead of target path. Fixed via git plumbing (git update-index --add --cacheinfo 120000,<hash>,opencode.json). Pushed c9f44e1. Vercel production deploy dpl_5BnnqL1EjnsfFkKwkoDAspcChyjn built successfully and is READY at hades-os-monorepo.vercel.app.

frontendBundleAnalysis.summary: Installed rollup-plugin-visualizer, updated vite.config.js with async dynamic import for ESM compat. Generated stats-treemap.html (808 KB) + stats-raw-data.json. Main chunk (index-Bws-ezpb.js): 10,896.70 KB rendered / 7,951.7 KB gzip. Root cause: loginTemplate.html?raw in src/auth/LoginPage.jsx — 10,281 KB file with 3 embedded base64 PNGs (7.7 MB binary equivalent). @supabase SDK: 783.9 KB. react-dom: 130.6 KB. src/auth (excl. template): ~22 KB. Split chunk (HadesPrototypeApp): 97.68 KB / 51 KB gzip — react-router/router (48.3 KB) + Hades pages/components (127 KB) + lucide-react (10.4 KB). CSS: 53.30 KB.

base64ImageExtraction.summary: Extracted 3 base64 PNGs (bg-frame-0, bg-frame-1, bg-frame-2) from loginTemplate.html to frontend/public/assets/ as static files. Updated HTML src to /assets/bg-frame-{0,1,2}.png. Fixed loginTemplateParts.js regex to match any src (not just data:image). Bundle dropped from 10.9 MB to 474 KB (96% reduction). Build succeeds. All 391 tests pass.

hadesHermesMediaFrontendHandoff.summary: Created Hades/Hermes media frontend planning packet after reading Hermes docs. Added docs/hades/HERMES_MEDIA_FRONTEND_INTEGRATION.md, study log 006, plan log 013, handoff 022, scoped red contract tests, and env-gated media E2E proof. Red command npm run test:hades-hermes-media-red fails 7/7 as intended until profile media config, media upload/resolver routes, frontend Hermes media client, composer, app wiring, and attachment rendering exist. E2E command npm run test:hades-hermes-media-e2e skips unless HADES_HERMES_MEDIA_E2E=1.

hadesHermesMediaFixtures.summary: Added permanent tracked fixtures under file-exchange/hermes-media-fixtures: sample-image.png, sample-audio.wav, sample-video.avi, sample-document.pdf, plus README.md warning not to delete as cleanup. Added scripts/generate-hermes-media-fixtures.mjs and npm run generate:hades-media-fixtures; generator is deterministic and does not remove neighboring files. Updated media E2E proof to default to these fixtures, including PDF and video upload coverage.

hadesHermesMediaFrontend.summary: Implemented full media frontend integration. Backend: profile config (GROQ_API_KEY, STT_GROQ_MODEL, stt/tts/vision/openrouter, media toolsets), POST /:profileName/media upload route with multer (MIME/extension validation, path traversal guard, text/PDF extraction), GET /:profileName/media/:attachmentId resolver (MEDIA tag parser, stream download, cross-profile protection). Frontend: hermesMediaClient.js (startHermesSession, sendHermesResponse, uploadHermesMedia, transcribeHermesAudio, synthesizeHermesSpeech, buildHermesInputFromComposer), HermesMediaComposer.jsx (attach/drop/paste files, mic recording, attachment chips, transcript preview), ChatBubble.js attachment rendering (image/video/audio inline, document download cards, legacy mediaUrl preservation), HadesPrototypeApp.jsx Hermes session bootstrap, Hermes /v1/responses send path with attachment upload before send, TTS playback. All 7/7 contract tests passing, 11/11 media verification tests passing, 18/18 peer-model tests passing, E2E skips cleanly.

hadesHermesNoLegacyFallbackGateway.summary: Removed silent legacy chat fallback from frontend Hermes chat path: HadesPrototypeApp no longer imports/calls sendGeneralChat or local draft fallback on Hermes errors; UI returns explicit Hermes-unavailable/error message. Added no-fallback contract to scripts/hades-hermes-media-contract.tdd.test.mjs. Added createHermesProfileGatewayProcessManager with bearer-capable health check + spawn of `hermes -p <profileName> gateway`, wired into createHermesProfileSessionBroker and index.js so session bootstrap verifies/starts the profile gateway before returning hermesApiBaseUrl. Provisioner now exposes raw API_SERVER_KEY only as a non-enumerable server-side property so registry/vault can inject it while JSON responses stay secret-free. Edge auth proxy now fails closed with 503 instead of fake 200 edge_ready when upstream Hermes is down. Added unit tests for no-spawn when healthy, spawn+health wait, broker gateway readiness, non-serialized API key access, and edge proxy fail-closed behavior.

hadesHermesMediaPlanE2eRun.summary: Ran full E2E proof against Railway production. Fixed 3 issues: (1) GROQ_API_KEY was missing on Railway -- set via railway variables set; (2) edge-tts CLI not installed in Docker image -- added pip install edge-tts + symlink; (3) E2E test auth mismatch -- added x-user-id/x-tenant-id anonymous headers so upload resolveAuth matches session profile. All 1/1 E2E tests pass (session, image send, STT, TTS, PDF upload, media download, video upload). Added stderr capture to gateway manager for diagnostics. Fixed gateway transient failure on first deploy (Hermes binary was installed correctly, health check passed after redeploy). Added API docs for POST /:profileName/media and GET /:profileName/media/:attachmentId. Added sample-video.webm fixture for proper browser video playback testing (185 B WebM container).

wireHermesMediaComposer.summary: Wired HermesMediaComposer into MinionsScreen replacing inline textarea. Added isUploading state to HadesProvider context (true during uploadPendingAttachments, false in finally). Filtered extension keys display to only show active (non-revoked) keys. Build passes, all 32 chat media tests + 8 extension tests pass.
